precheck.sql:
SELECT NOT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1
  FROM information_schema.columns
  WHERE table_schema = 'public'
    AND table_name = 'bug'
    AND column_name = 'id'
)

postcheck.sql:
SELECT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1
  FROM information_schema.columns
  WHERE table_schema = 'public'
    AND table_name = 'bug'
    AND column_name = 'id'
)

precheck.sql:
SELECT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1
  FROM information_schema.columns
  WHERE table_schema = 'public'
    AND table_name = 'bug'
    AND column_name = 'id'
)
SELECT NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM "public"."bug" WHERE "id" IS NULL)

execute.sql: ALTER TABLE "public"."bug" ALTER COLUMN "id" SET NOT NULL

postcheck.sql:
SELECT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1
  FROM information_schema.columns
  WHERE table_schema = 'public'
    AND table_name = 'bug'
    AND column_name = 'id'
    AND is_nullable = 'NO'
)

precheck.description: ensure primary key "bug_pkey" does not exist
precheck.sql: SELECT NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 AS "one" FROM "pg_constraint" AS "c" INNER JOIN "pg_namespace" AS "n" ON "n"."oid" = "c"."connamespace" WHERE ("c"."conname" = $1 AND "n"."nspname" = $2 AND "c"."conrelid" = to_regclass($3))) AS "result"

execute.sql: ALTER TABLE "public"."bug" ADD CONSTRAINT "bug_pkey" PRIMARY KEY ("id")

postcheck.sql: SELECT EXISTS (SELECT 1 AS "one" FROM "pg_constraint" AS "c" INNER JOIN "pg_namespace" AS "n" ON "n"."oid" = "c"."connamespace" WHERE ("c"."conname" = $1 AND "n"."nspname" = $2 AND "c"."conrelid" = to_regclass($3))) AS "result"

ADD CONSTRAINT "bug_id_fkey"
FOREIGN KEY ("id")
REFERENCES "public"."task" ("id")
